subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: Attaining unto this Mountain was the ultimate desire of the Prophets… After two thousand years of wandering, the Jewish people will return to the Holy Land and embrace the Cause of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: این کوه مقدس خدا منتهای آرزوی انبیاء است و مطاف ملاء اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @future of Haifa; of the Holy Land, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @predictions and prophecies, @universal peace; world unity
